title: Self-referential associations
description: Given a table with associations pointing to itself (parent/child trees), when resolved, it should correctly traverse the hierarchy without infinite loops. Spec: features/associations/self_referential.feature

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: starting self-referential associations. Next: implement parent/child traversal without loops + steps in Python/Rust. Blockers: none.
